name: Professor Rachel V Harrison
title: Professor of Thai Cultural Studies
department: School of Languages, Cultures and Linguistics
biography: Cultural studies, cinema, modern literature, postcolonial and gender studies with reference to Thailand and more widely to mainland South East Asia; medical humanities and public engagement with reference to Northeast Thailand (Isan) and Lao PDR; literary criticism and South East Asian Literatures in a comparative context; perceptions of cultural difference, Orientalism and Otherness.
research_interests: Cinema, Literature, Cultural Studies, Gender Studies
